chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 104 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.01.2018 For orders on MA 761/18 For orders on statement None present for applicant 1. Granted. 2. Learned counsel has filed statement praying that he be permitted to withdraw this bail application. Accordingly this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
